title: commiphora lamii
intro: Commiphora lamii, also known as East African myrrh, is a plant species that belongs to the family Burseraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Commiphora lamii has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing pain. Herbal preparations of Commiphora lamii, such as tinctures and ointments, are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
